summary: Phase 7B Advanced Reports tested. Backend 18/23 (78%) pytest pass; all 5 failures share one root cause: ValidationError returns HTTP 422 instead of 400 (spec violation). Frontend renders all 4 new Finance sub-pages (Report Builder, Pivot, MoM/YoY, Vendor Scorecard) correctly, login + nav + vendor detail drilldown work; some advertised data-testid attributes are missing.

critical.issue: ValidationError returns HTTP 422 instead of 400. Phase 7B spec explicitly requires 400 for: empty dimensions, empty metrics, invalid dimension, invalid metric, dim_x==dim_y. Caused by core/exceptions.py mapping ValidationError to status_code=422 (FastAPI convention) -- spec wants business-domain validation to use 400. Affected tests: test_validation_empty_dimensions, test_validation_empty_metrics, test_validation_invalid_dimension, test_validation_invalid_metric, test_pivot_same_dim_returns_400. Same issue flagged in iteration_1.

missing_testids.note: Save button is visible and clickable but lacks data-testid
CSV button visible; matrix cells lack data-testid for E2E selection
KPI value cards present (Period 2026-04 / Previous 2026-03 / Delta -17.47%) but lack data-testid attrs to assert values in E2E
Table is rendered; rows have data-testid scorecard-row-* but the wrapping table does not. Detail panel after click lacks po-breakdown testid (header reads 'Recent POs (10)')

passed_tests_backend: GET /api/reports/catalog with all 5 dimensions, 8 metrics, mom+yoy comparatives
GET /api/reports/vendor-scorecard?top=5 returns ranked list, sorted by total_spend desc, all required keys present
Composite score arithmetic verified (on_time*0.40 + price_stability*0.25 + (100-defect)*0.20 + lead_score*0.15) against backend output
GET /api/reports/vendor-scorecard/{vendor_id} returns po_breakdown[] with required keys
POST /api/reports/builder/run basic run — totals match row sums
GET /api/reports/pivot returns x_labels, y_labels, cells, row/col_totals, grand_total with consistent dimensions
GET /api/reports/comparatives mom returns previous_period 2026-03; yoy returns 2025-04; rolling_12m has 12 entries
POST /api/reports/saved → list → DELETE round-trip works (soft-delete confirmed by re-listing)
passed_tests_frontend: Finance sub-nav contains Report Builder, Pivot, MoM/YoY, Vendor Scorecard tabs
/finance/vendor-scorecard renders summary cards (Vendors=6, Total Spend=Rp 83.241.200, Avg On-Time 81.25%, Vendor Grade A=3) + ranked table
Click vendor row opens Detail Vendor panel with composite, on-time, lead time, price stab, defect rate + Recent POs (10) breakdown
/finance/report-builder shows Dimensi, Metrik, Filter sections, Run Report and Save buttons; Saved Reports panel visible
/finance/comparatives shows metric+period+MoM/YoY+outlet+brand controls; KPI cards (Period -17.47% delta) + rolling 12m sparkline rendered
No JS pageerror or console errors on any of the 4 new Phase 7B pages
action_items: HIGH: Make business-domain ValidationError return HTTP 400 (currently 422). Likely fix in /app/backend/core/exceptions.py — set ValidationError.status_code=400. This is a contract change explicitly required by Phase 7B spec for builder/run + pivot endpoints.

MEDIUM: Add missing data-testid attributes: builder-save (ReportBuilder.jsx), pivot-export-csv + pivot-cell (PivotReport.jsx), comp-current/comp-previous/comp-delta (Comparatives.jsx), scorecard-table + po-breakdown (VendorScorecard.jsx).
LOW (carried from iteration_1): outlet@torado.id non-admin credentials still not present in /app/memory/test_credentials.md, blocking RBAC negative-permission testing for non-Super Admin personas.
critical_code_review_comments: reports_service.py line 657: delta_pct can divide by zero protected (prev=0 -> None) — good.
reports_service.py: vendor_scorecard returns per-PO `received_total` summed from grs.grand_total, but composite_score uses GR-derived total_spend; correct.

reports_service.py report_builder: when 'category' dim is requested, gr_count is split fractionally (1/len(lines)) which can produce non-integer counts in the rows — acceptable for analytical view but worth documenting.
reports_service.py file is 791 lines — over 700-line guideline. Consider splitting (vendor_scorecard, builder, pivot, comparatives, saved) into separate modules.

core/exceptions.py: ValidationError currently maps to 422 — but Phase 7B spec requires 400 for domain-level validation. FastAPI's automatic 422 on Pydantic body parse can co-exist; AuroraException(ValidationError) should map to 400.
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded via core.db.serialize — verified.

success_rate.backend: 78% (18/23 — 5 failures all from same 422-vs-400 root cause)
success_rate.frontend: 85% (all 4 pages render and core flows work; a handful of testids are missing)

test_credentials: admin@torado.id / Torado@2026 (Super Admin) verified working. Non-admin outlet@torado.id still NOT working (carried from iteration_1).
seed_data_creation: None created. Existing Phase 7B seed data (240 daily_sales, 45 POs, 38 GRs, 480 JEs, 6 vendors) verified present and produced sensible scorecard (Total Spend Rp 83.2M, 6 vendors, 3 grade-A).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Phase 7B endpoints fully wired and functional; only contract-level issue is ValidationError -> 422 (should be 400 per spec). Frontend pages render with seeded data; verify newly-added testids after main agent fixes them. CSV export on /finance/pivot was not actually exercised (button present but click not validated).
